title: Fix of linking error with conflicting function/class names

features.name: class static member access via scope resolution operator
features.description: Code should include a class with a static member function accessed via the :: operator from another class context
features.snippet: class setup_coefficients; static function int create(); return 1; endfunction endclass class biquad_vseq; int c_setup = setup_coefficients::create(); endclass

features.name: class member function named same as another class
features.description: Code should include a class with a member function that has the same name as another class in the same scope, creating a potential name conflict
features.snippet: class setup_coefficients; static function int create(); return 1; endfunction endclass class biquad_vseq; int c_setup = setup_coefficients::create(); function void setup_coefficients(); endfunction endclass
